title: Early Experimentation
alt: Prototype disc fitted with vertical wooden dowels during an early studio sound and form experiment
caption: Tim with a prototype disc fitted with vertical wooden dowels.

title: Cutting the Rings
alt: Large plywood rings being routed in the workshop
caption: Large circular rings take shape from plywood.

title: The Rings
alt: Freshly cut concentric plywood rings nested within the original sheet
caption: The freshly cut rings, still nested within the plywood sheet from which they were routed.

title: Rings in Space
alt: Suspended wooden rings casting concentric shadows during an early lighting test
caption: An early suspension test: wooden rings hung from wires in a darkened space, casting shadows on the wall behind them.

title: Cutting the Legs
alt: Wooden dowels being cut to size for the hanging interior structure
caption: Wooden dowels cut to length. These hang vertically inside the finished sculpture.

title: Diagramming the Rotation
alt: Digital overhead schematic of the base motor and belt-drive system
caption: Tim's schematic for the motor and belt-drive system, working out servo placement and pulley routing.

title: Building the Base
alt: Large circular base framework being glued and clamped together
caption: The radial rib framework of the base, glued and clamped together.

title: The Bent Skirt
alt: Curved plywood exterior band beside the assembled base framework
caption: The curved exterior band — a strip of plywood bent into a full circle — sits beside the assembled rib framework.

title: Securing the Base
alt: Fasteners being drilled into the assembled circular base while clamps remain in place
caption: Tim drills fasteners into the assembled base, with glue and bar clamps still in place. The structure is nearly five feet in diameter.

title: Electronics and Motion
alt: Servo motors, brackets, wiring, and a wooden bearing housing laid out for assembly
caption: Tate lays out the servo motors, brackets, and control wiring for Drift's rotation mechanism.

title: Full Installation Design
alt: Scale study rendering showing the installation footprint relative to a standing viewer
caption: Tim's scale study for the Drift installation.

title: Hanging the 'Brain'
alt: Close-up of hands assembling goBILDA servo motors, brackets, and an Arduino on the circular plywood base
caption: Tate hangs the 'brain' of the installation which drives the rotation of the suspended rings above. The 'brain' consists of servo motors, brackets, and an Arduino control board.

title: Attaching the Strings
alt: Tim standing beneath the suspended ring, attaching hanging strings to the structure
caption: Hanging strings attached to the suspended ring from below.

title: Programming the Movement
alt: Tate programming at a laptop beneath the suspended ring with hanging strings
caption: Tate programs Drift's rotational behavior from a laptop in the workshop.
